Landing.heroTitle: The work marketplace for migrants & honest employers.
Landing.heroSubtitle: Search shifts like Upwork searches talent — with escrow, TrustWork Card, multi-profiles, and GPS check-in/out built in.
Landing.heroPlaceholderJobs: Search by role, skill, or suburb — e.g. kitchen hand Melbourne
Landing.heroPlaceholderTalent: Describe the role or skills you need
Landing.heroTrustLine: Used by hospitality, construction, cleaning & care teams across AU
Landing.splitWorkersDesc: One account, multiple professional profiles, job matches with visa filters, wallet & certified hours.
Landing.splitBizDesc: Fund jobs into escrow, approve hours from GPS check-in/out, control TrustWork Card spend per shift.
Landing.stepsSubtitle: Clear steps from signup to payday — same clarity you expect from a global marketplace.
Landing.step1Desc: Choose Worker or Employer, accept Privacy & Terms, add visa or ABN details.
Landing.step2Desc: Search on a map, filter pay & visa, apply with the right profile card.
Landing.step3Desc: Check-in inside the geofence, pause breaks, check-out with photo — escrow releases when approved.
Landing.statsSubtitle: Casual and contract work keeps the country running — TrustWork adds payment certainty.
Landing.whySubtitle: Beyond a job board — built for on-site work, compliance, and trust.
Landing.diffCardDesc: EPI, materials, certifications — employer-paid or worker-paid rules per purchase.
Landing.diffMultiDesc: Cleaner, painter, kitchen hand — separate skills, rates, and RSA / White Card flags.
Landing.diffPayDesc: Hours backed by check-in data get priority in mediation — rules you can read upfront.
Landing.testimonialsSubtitle: Workers and hiring managers who needed less admin and safer pay.
Landing.tWorker1Quote: Hours tied to GPS finally stopped the ‘he said / she said’ at knock-off.
Landing.tWorker2Quote: I run two profiles — weekday cleaning and weekend retail — one login.
Landing.tEmployerQuote: Card approvals for supplies kept our site moving without WhatsApp chaos.
Landing.partnersSubtitle: Education, stablecoins, and training pathways across Australia.
Landing.newsSubtitle: RSS — Department of Home Affairs & SBS (when feeds respond).
Landing.footerRights: © {year} TrustWork Australia · Built for fair work Down Under

Jobs.title: Browse jobs
Jobs.subtitle: Filter demo listings — live database connects next.
Jobs.sidebarNote: Filters update the URL — MVP preview data.
Jobs.hireBannerDesc: Switch to employer signup to fund a job with escrow and invite workers.
